title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahindra Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
